arts.ttl: Napoli Open Talks for Feyenoord Star Igor Paixao
arts.sum: Napoli and Feyenoord have reportedly held preliminary talks over Igor Paixao's potential summer transfer to Serie A. According to Calciomercato, the Scudetto hopefuls have tested the waters for the sought-after forward. The post Napoli Open Talks for Feyenoord Star Igor Paixao appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Napoli vs. AC Milan, Matchday 30’s key game
arts.sum: In the last 12 Serie A meetings between Napoli and AC Milan, both sides won four games (D4), after the Partenopei had been unbeaten in each of their previous eight matches against the Rossoneri in the competition, winning six in the period. Napoli (61) have 14 points more than AC Milan (47) in the table: only in three of the 153 previous matches between the two sides in Serie A history have the Azzurri faced the Rossoneri with a higher advantage (+15 on February 8th, 2014; +25 on April 15th, 2018 and +23 on April 2nd, 2023).
